commands.repair_reason: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the previous changelog blocker is gone and the remaining action is normal maintainer acceptance of the intentional CLI compatibility change.; Cleared: The current diff is limited to CLI parsing and tests, with no dependency, workflow, package-resolution, permission, secret, or new code-execution surface changes. commands.review_summary:
This bot replacement branch rejects malformed or explicit empty Gateway RPC timeout values, aligns the shared Gateway RPC omitted-timeout fallback to 30s, validates `cron add --timeout-seconds`, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +70. Total +88 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns fallback for explicit empty timeout strings, keeps a 10s shared Gateway RPC runtime fallback despite the 30s CLI option default, and lets `cron add` treat empty timeout-seconds as unset. I did not execute commands because this is a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair is needed; the previous changelog blocker is gone and the remaining action is normal maintainer acceptance of the intentional CLI compatibility change.

target.title: fix(cli): validate gateway RPC timeout inputs
target.body:
## Summary
- Repair #54646 on its existing contributor branch.
- Align Gateway RPC omitted-timeout fallback with the 30000 ms CLI default.
- Reject malformed and explicit empty Gateway RPC --timeout values instead of silently falling back.
- Validate explicit cron add --timeout-seconds values so invalid input fails at the CLI boundary.

## Credit
Carries forward #54646 by @ruanrrn and preserves the earlier timeout-validation context from #40953.

## Validation
- pnpm check:changed
- pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/gateway-rpc.timeout-option.test.ts

## Out of scope
#60661 accepted-run timeout ownership semantics are related but separate and should not be included in this repair.

Clownfish 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: ghcrawl-207037-agentic-merge
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/54646, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/40953
- Credit: Preserve @ruanrrn as the original #54646 contributor; repair the existing branch because maintainer_can_modify=true.; Keep #40953 by @comeran in the historical attribution if the final merge notes mention the earlier broader timeout-validation attempt.; Do not borrow #60661 accepted-run timeout semantics in this repair; that branch is related but blocked by separate product-direction and build/runtime review findings.
- Validation: pnpm check:changed; pnpm -s vitest run src/cli/gateway-rpc.timeout-option.test.ts
- Repair fallback: source PR #54646 is a fork branch requiring rebase; use replacement branch because GitHub App pushes to contributor forks can be rejected when rebased upstream history includes workflow files

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning xhigh; reviewed against aeda3bcecdde.
target.author: app/openclaw-clownfish
